stemHtml: On the current frequency in use there are two different callsigns ABC 123 and DCB 123. What could you expect to happen?

options.a: You may be instructed by the tower to change to a new callsign.
options.b: You take the initiative to change to new callsign.
options.c: May be forced to leave the frequency.
options.d: May be ask to come up with a new callsign.
